hooks.command: command -v iBuild >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f .ibuildos.yaml ] && { iBuild validate . >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'iBuildOS: iBuild validate is failing — run /ibuild-audit to see the gaps (suggest-only).'; }; exit 0
hooks.commandWindows: if ((Get-Command iBuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -and (Test-Path .ibuildos.yaml)) { iBuild validate . *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output 'iBuildOS: iBuild validate is failing - run /ibuild-audit to see the gaps (suggest-only).' } }; exit 0
